item.title: Undefeated Pizza & Shake Challenge
item.description: Bragging rights are on the line as this pizza and shake challenge tests whether the streak survives.

item.title: Can He Beat My Big Texan Record?
item.description: A massive steak challenge with the clock ticking and the pressure building fast.

item.title: BBQ Burger Challenge in Under 5
item.description: A big burger with a tiny clock and zero room for error—would you try this one? Fun food challenge energy with BBQ flavor and a big plate.

media:content.media:title: BBQ Burger Challenge in Under 5
media:content.media:description: A big burger with a tiny clock and zero room for error—would you try this one? Fun food challenge energy with BBQ flavor and a big plate.

item.title: BBQ Beast vs The Hottest Sauce Ever
item.description: A BBQ food challenge with a bold sauce twist and plenty of flavor. Would you take a bite?
